privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Aerobridge aircraft registry. Setup creates 5 test aircraft: 2 compliant baseline aircraft (Compliant Drone 1, Compliant Drone 2) and 3 uncertified target aircraft (Project X-1 Prototype, Surveyor Alpha, Cargo Lifter V2) via Django ORM in setup_task.sh. The admin interface is at http://localhost:8000/admin/ with credentials username='admin', password='adminpass123'. Agents must create new Type Certificate records for uncertified aircraft and output a compliance report to /home/ga/compliance_report.txt. Success verification checks: zero uncertified aircraft remain, all target aircraft are certified, new certificates were created (not reused), report exists with relevant content, and task completion metrics are logged to /tmp/task_result.json.
